calendar.matters:
DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Jun-03-2026 Continued To Jul-01-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505 - Matter Not Reported

Plaintiff Equity One (West Coast Portfolio) appearing represented by Anthony Phillips, Esq.
Defendant Boston Market Corp. not appearing.

This department did not receive any paper courtesty copies prior to today's hearing.

This matter is continued until July 1, 2026 at 9:00am in dept. 505 to allow Plaintiff an oppertunity to provide courtesy copies ahead of the next hearing date.

Declaration Of Jackie Wallace In Support Of Plaintiffs Application For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-08-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar for a request for default judgment against Defendant Boston Market Corporation.

Dept.505: Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: K. Valdes; Bailiffs: Deputy Gomez and Deputy Jones; Proceedings reported by "For the Record", commencing at 9:47:01 a.m., pausing at 9:55:07 a.m. , resuming at 10:26: 05 a.m. and concluding at 10:27:33 a.m. (D505)

Christin Kim, Esq. representing Plaintiff via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Boston Market Corporation not appearing.
Witness Jackie Wallace, sworn to testify for the Plaintiff

Counsel to provide a summary in support of the request for judgment.
Court examines witness. Witness testifies.

Court discusses issues with Counsel.
Counsel offers proof and argument as to the request for future damages.

Matter is passed for Counsel to confer with Plaintiff.

Hearing resumes.

Counsel for plaintiff requests that the matter be taken off calendar for plaintiff to refile an amended complaint and restart the process.

The Court GRANTS the request and the matter is taken off calendar.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
